overview.description: Prague-based AI consulting firm delivering multi-agent automation, AI audits, custom AI agents, and training for Czech businesses
overview.description_long: AI Excellence s.r.o. (branded AIExcellence) provides AI-powered automation solutions to Czech businesses. Core offerings include AI audits (identifying and prioritising AI opportunities), multi-agent systems (teams of AI agents managing complex workflows), a catalog of pre-built AI agents for procurement, HR, hospitality, marketing, and public tenders, and interactive AI training workshops conducted on-site. The company targets SMEs and enterprises looking to automate repetitive tasks and integrate AI into operations. A testimonial from Matěj Dvorský, CCO of Slevomat, is featured on the site.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in late 2021 as AI Excellence s.r.o. (IČO: 13951106), based in Karlín, Praha 8

key_milestones.event: Launched AI agent catalog with pre-built agents across multiple verticals

leadership.name: Vojtěch Komenda
leadership.role: CEO / Jednatel společnosti, Senior AI Consultant

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: AIExcellence's core offering — building AI agents, multi-agent systems, and prompt engineering on top of foundation models (OpenAI etc.) — has no visible proprietary data moat. As AI tooling matures, clients can increasingly implement these solutions in-house or via low-code platforms, making the consulting layer commoditisable.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The market for AI implementation and automation is real and growing fast in Czech Republic, but also extremely crowded with many boutique AI consultancies competing for the same SME and enterprise buyers. Slevomat as a client is a positive signal but the moat is thin.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding identified. The company appears bootstrapped with a small team of ~11 people founded in 2021. Without revenue visibility or external capital, survival depends entirely on consulting revenue, which is uncertain for early-stage firms.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A small bootstrapped AI consultancy built primarily on top of third-party LLM APIs with no proprietary data or product moat. While operating in a growing market, the combination of high AGI displacement risk, intense competition, and no known funding makes this a high-risk entry in a job-seeker catalog.

metadata.notes: Legal name is AI Excellence s.r.o., IČO 13951106, founded 2021-11-25 per Czech ARES registry. Website is a Wix site in Czech. 11 team members listed on the /o-nas page. Client testimonial from Matěj Dvorský (CCO, Slevomat). No careers page found. No funding or Glassdoor data found — company is likely too small and bootstrapped.
